set.body: Add a general CgWorkspace and IterativeSolvers.cgWith entry point that reuse caller-owned vectors and cached immutable views while preserving the existing cg API and convergence semantics. Certify residuals, early convergence, reuse overwrite behavior, dimensions, JVM/Scala.js tests, and allocation evidence. Motivated by ScalaFIM HalfFlow P2: stock CG allocated about 2.62 MB per 32^3 solve versus about 23 B for the same recurrence with reusable Gale vectors.
set.title: Add reusable allocation-controlled CG workspace
